tool.name: NotebookLM
tool.shortDescription: Google's AI note-taker that answers questions using your own documents
tool.description: NotebookLM helps you understand and organize large amounts of information. You upload notes, PDFs, or course materials, and it summarizes them, answers questions, and generates podcast-style audio recaps. Ideal for studying, research, and reviewing dense material.
cons: Usage limits on free plan (queries, audio summaries)
tool.bestFor: Studying for exams, reviewing research papers, summarizing long documents, preparing reports, organizing project materials, and getting up to speed on dense topics

relatedTools.name: Gamma
relatedTools.shortDescription: AI presentation and document creator that turns notes into polished slides
relatedTools.description: Gamma turns notes into presentations, documents, and simple webpages. It's designed for quick, polished output without manual design work. Ideal for pitch decks, reports, and visual communication.
pros: Good for pitch decks and reports
cons: Free tier has strict AI credit limits
Export options limited on lower tiers
relatedTools.bestFor: Pitch decks, reports, presentations, and quick visual communication

relatedTools.name: Fathom
relatedTools.shortDescription: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings
relatedTools.description: Fathom records meetings and produces summaries, transcripts, and action items. It integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Ideal for keeping track of decisions and follow-ups without manual note-taking.
features: Integration with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams
relatedTools.bestFor: Recording meetings, generating summaries, tracking action items, and keeping meeting history searchable

relatedTools.name: ChatGPT
relatedTools.shortDescription: General-purpose AI assistant for writing, coding, research, and problem-solving
relatedTools.description: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship AI assistant, capable of handling writing, coding, document analysis, research, and multimodal tasks including image and video generation via Sora 2. It supports file uploads (PDFs, spreadsheets, images) and provides structured responses for a wide range of personal and professional tasks.
pros: Strong document analysis and data extraction
Large ecosystem of plugins and GPTs
relatedTools.bestFor: General-purpose AI work, document analysis, coding assistance, research, and narrative video creation
